title: The Merchant???
conditions: At least 100 Gold or have a Foul Potion
notes: This is a custom merchant event with a unique merchant interface. The merchant offers 6 randomly selected relics from a pool of 9 fake relics, each costing [gold]50 Gold[/gold] to purchase. The player can interact with the merchant to buy relics, or throw a Foul Potion to trigger a fight with the FakeMerchantEventEncounter. Upon defeat or escape from the encounter, the player receives the [gold]Fake Merchant's Rug[/gold] relic along with any relics they purchased during the event.
